product_overview: A Discord thread management service exposed via the MCP tool interface that allows creating threads from messages, listing active (and optionally archived) threads, and archiving threads, with inputs validated by Pydantic models.
core_goals: Allow creating a new Discord thread from an existing message with configurable auto-archive durations.
Provide listing of active threads per channel, with an option to include archived threads.
Allow archiving existing threads and handle idempotent archive requests gracefully.
Validate all inputs using Pydantic models and return detailed validation errors.
Enforce channel allowlist/access rules configured via access.json and access logic.

features.name: Create Thread
features.description: Create a new thread from an existing message in a channel, with optional custom name and configurable auto-archive duration (allowed values: 60, 1440, 4320, 10080).
user_flows: TOOL fetch_messages with auth and payload {channel_id: '987', message_id: '123'} -> Receive 200 with message object -> TOOL create_thread with auth and payload {channel_id: '987', message_id: '123', name: 'Discussão Trading', auto_archive_duration: 60} -> Receive 200 with {thread_id, thread_name: 'Discussão Trading', parent_channel_id: '987', message_id: '123'}

TOOL create_thread with auth and payload {channel_id: '987', message_id: '123', name: 'Discussão Trading'} -> Receive 200 with {thread_id, thread_name: 'Discussão Trading', parent_channel_id: '987', message_id: '123'}
TOOL create_thread with auth and payload {channel_id: '000', message_id: '123', name: 'Discussão Trading'} -> Receive 403 with error 'channel not allowlisted'
TOOL create_thread with auth and payload {channel_id: '987', message_id: '999999', name: 'Discussão Trading'} -> Receive 404 with error 'message not found'
TOOL create_thread without auth and payload {channel_id: '987', message_id: '123', name: 'Auto Thread'} -> Receive 401 or 403 indicating authentication/authorization required

features.name: List Threads
features.description: List active threads in a channel, returning thread metadata including message_count and archived flag; can optionally include archived threads when requested.
user_flows: TOOL list_threads with auth and payload {channel_id: '987'} -> Receive 200 with [ {thread_id, thread_name, message_count, created_at, archived}, ... ] (only active threads)

TOOL list_threads with auth and payload {channel_id: '987', include_archived: true} -> Receive 200 with [ {thread_id, thread_name, message_count, created_at, archived:true}, ... ] (includes archived threads)
TOOL list_threads with auth and payload {channel_id: '111'} -> Receive 200 with [] (channel has no active threads)
TOOL list_threads with auth and payload {channel_id: '000'} -> Receive 403 with error 'channel not allowlisted'

features.name: Archive Thread
features.description: Archive an existing thread by thread_id. Archiving is idempotent: archiving an already-archived thread returns success without modification.
user_flows: TOOL archive_thread with auth and payload {thread_id: '555'} -> Receive 200 with {thread_id: '555', archived: true}
TOOL archive_thread with auth and payload {thread_id: '555'} (thread already archived) -> Receive 200 with {thread_id: '555', archived: true} (no-op success)
TOOL archive_thread with auth and payload {thread_id: '999999'} -> Receive 404 with error 'thread not found'
TOOL archive_thread with auth and payload {thread_id: '555'} where thread belongs to channel not in groups -> Receive 403 with error 'channel not allowlisted'

features.name: Input Validation (Pydantic)
features.description: Validate all incoming inputs for thread operations using Pydantic models and return clear validation errors for invalid types or values (e.g., auto_archive_duration).
user_flows: TOOL create_thread with auth and payload {channel_id: '987', message_id: '123', name: 'Valid', auto_archive_duration: 60} -> Receive 200 (CreateThreadInput validated by Pydantic)

TOOL create_thread with auth and payload {channel_id: '987', message_id: '123', auto_archive_duration: 30} -> Receive 422 Pydantic validation error with details indicating auto_archive_duration must be one of [60,1440,4320,10080]
TOOL create_thread with auth and payload {channel_id: 987 (invalid type), message_id: '123'} -> Receive 422 Pydantic validation error with field type error details
TOOL create_thread with auth and payload missing required fields {message_id: '123'} -> Receive 422 Pydantic validation error listing missing required field channel_id

features.name: Discord MCP Server
features.description: Servidor MCP para integracao Claude Code com Discord via tools

endpoints.description: Cria thread a partir de mensagem

features.name: Skybridge API Server
features.description: Servidor FastAPI principal com WebUI e integracoes

features.name: Kanban Integration
features.description: Integracao com Trello para gestao de tarefas

features.name: Webhook Processor
features.description: Processa webhooks do GitHub com fila de jobs

known_limitations.issue: Discord MCP usa stdio transport, nao HTTP
known_limitations.impact: Nao pode ser testado via HTTP direto, requer MCP client

known_limitations.issue: Testes de integracao requerem Discord bot token valido
known_limitations.impact: Alguns testes podem falhar sem credenciais reais
